title: Encountering a Dream
overview: Pro golfer Kiria crosses paths with the mischievous Gawain — who possesses an astonishing talent for golf even though he's never played the sport.

title: The Importance of Each Stroke
overview: Lost in Tokyo, Gawain has a fateful meeting with a sullen young golfer, who shows him the way to Kiria's home — and a new aspect of golf.

title: Twin Peaks of Talent
overview: Gawain learns that making the ball fly isn't enough to become the world's best golfer. He asks Kiria to give him a crash course on putting and iron shots.

title: First Tournament
overview: With his new skills, Gawain breezes through the first half of his inaugural tournament. But how will he fare when faced with bad weather conditions?

title: Camelot Academy
overview: At Camelot Academy, Gawain meets his new classmates, gifted junior golfers from around the world. Riser, unimpressed by Gawain's size, challenges him.

title: Uncrowned Prince
overview: To debut on the golf course, Gawain must win a game against Liebel on the D-level training course. But Liebel behaves strangely during the match play.

title: An Explosive Situation
overview: With the Camelot Cup coming up, tensions rise with only seven spots open. Some older schoolmates take aggressive measures to cut the competition.

title: The Tryouts Begin
overview: On the day of the tryouts, Gawain is up against Li and Todoin in a spiral course where his usual straight drive won't help. Can he master the slice?

title: Stubbornness and Pride
overview: Yumiko struggles with a bunker shot, while Kuromine's gift for seeing snake-like putting lines gets her ahead. Lancelot's unexpected visit causes a stir.

title: Playoffs
overview: The final playoff will decide who takes the last spot. But first, Riser and Gawain need to conquer a challenging course — and Kanazono's dirty tricks.

title: A Venerable Visitor
overview: Gawain stumbles upon an unassuming salaryman wandering around the school grounds who turns out to be their new coach: Hitomi Katase, a former pro golfer.

title: To the Battlefield!
overview: Kuromine challenges transfer student Lancelot, staking her pride as a putter and a spot on the team. The Japan team heads to England for the Camelot Cup.

title: Worthy New Opponents
overview: Gawain's encounter with Quester from the U.S. team leaves him in shock. Lancelot joins some of his American counterparts for a training session.

title: The Door to One's Soul
overview: Still rattled from his previous match with Quester, Gawain keeps duffing his shots. While he deals with his mental block, Platalissa confides in him.

title: Camelot Cup Competition!
overview: A surprise change to the U.K. team's order of play disrupts Ms. Aria's strategy for the Japan team, but Gawain and Lancelot rise to the challenge.

title: An Awakened Power
overview: As the pairs take on increasingly tricky courses, Gawain struggles with his control and strength — until he begins to see the sparks of a new power.

title: The Brits Go Into Overdrive
overview: Quester begins to lose confidence after witnessing Gawain's incredible growth. After coasting in the first half, Sfida and Ice turn the heat up.

title: The Way to Victory
overview: Faced with the final two holes, the U.K. and U.S. teams go all out. Will Gawain and Lancelot be able to clinch victory for the Japan team?

title: The Dark Nobleman
overview: While Liebel and Todoin brood over their poor performance against Tristan, the other players gear up for the Camelot Cup's main event: individual matches.

title: Monsters
overview: The Brits display their monstrous talent: Percival's impressive backswing and Tristan's incredible power and precision fire up Gawain and Lancelot.

title: An Approaching Destiny
overview: As the competition grows more heated and the young golfers battle it out on the fairways, Gawain's Gift attracts a mysterious man's attention.

title: Heart of Glass
overview: Wanglian's mastery over turbulent winds stuns everyone. Meanwhile, Lancelot's confidence starts to shatter as he loses control of his strokes.

title: Awaken!
overview: Gawain enters an injury-induced trance after being hit by Percival's ball, and a profound power emerges from him. Lancelot continues to falter.

title: A Contest of Gift
overview: Thanks to Gawain's words, Lancelot gets back his confidence — and his Gift. Gawain's uncanny performance continues and catches Tristan's attention.

title: To the Top
overview: Finding himself shaken by Lancelot and Gawain's skills, Tristan reevaluates his motivations. Gawain refuses to back down despite his worsening injury.

title: See You Again!
overview: The Camelot Cup draws to a close, and the young golfers reflect on their results. At the hospital, Gawain gets an intriguing invite from Arthur.
